base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of attract_screen_results_stats — a ui from 1981 galaga. End-of-game stats screen: '—RESULTS— / SHOTS FIRED ___ / NUMBER OF HITS ___ / HIT-MISS RATIO ___%'. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: End-of-game stats screen: '—RESULTS— / SHOTS FIRED ___ / NUMBER OF HITS ___ / HIT-MISS RATIO ___%'; signature Galaga end-of-run stat display. Low hit-miss under ~30% felt disappointing; ≥70% was bragging-rights
